name: OpenClaw Logkeeper
description: Turn-by-turn conversation logger. Appends every agent exchange to daily markdown files across all surfaces (Discord, TUI, webchat, cron), regardless of model.

logDir.description: Directory to write daily log files. Supports ~/ prefix. Required — plugin disables itself at startup if not set.

filename.description: Filename template. Variables: {date} (YYYY-MM-DD), {channel} (provider name or 'tui'), {agent} (agentId). Default: '{date}-{channel}.md'

channels.description: Per-channel filename overrides. Key is provider name (e.g. 'discord', 'telegram') or 'tui'. Value is a filename template.

userAlias.description: Label for the user speaker. Default: 'user'

assistantAlias.description: Fallback label for the assistant speaker. Default: agent name from IDENTITY.md, then 'assistant'

maxLength.description: Maximum characters to write for the assistant response before truncating. 0 = unlimited. Default: 4000

includeCron.description: Include cron/heartbeat turns in logs. Default: false

metadata.description: Append a metadata line (model name + token counts) after the timestamp. Default: false
